name: mcp-server-chart
description: A Model Context Protocol server for generating visual charts using AntV.

rating.reason: The toolset provides good documentation overall with clear, descriptive tool names that indicate chart types. Descriptions adequately explain functionality and use cases with helpful examples (e.g., area chart physics example, column chart comparison rationale). Most parameters have clear descriptions with concrete examples showing expected data formats. However, some descriptions could be more concise, and there are minor issues like repetitive styling parameter documentation across tools and occasional verbose explanations that could be streamlined.
